title: AUKG-230 Lesbian FM "Saturday Girls Club" is now on air! ~A Real Erotic Lesbian Story~ Karen Hazuki Ayumu Sena - Ayumu Sena (Aiko Hirose)
overview: "Saturday Girls Club", hosted by "Ayumu Sena", is a radio program "for girls who like girls" that is broadcast live every Saturday. Chan! In the program, we will introduce naughty information such as "real lesbian stories" posted by listeners!
